---
name: i18n
description: Dual i18n system using Tolgee (TolgeeProvider, useTranslate, WithTranslation) for the UI layer and createI18n() for Canvas messages. Use when adding translations, supporting new languages, or wiring up language detection and suggestion flows.
---

# Internationalization (i18n)

## Overview

The plugin uses a custom i18n system for multi-language support. Translation files are stored as JSON and loaded dynamically based on user preference.

**Translation Files**: `/src/app/content/translations/`

## File Structure

```
/src/app/content/translations/
  en-US.json            # English (US)
  fr-FR.json            # French (France)
  de-DE.json            # German (Germany)
  es-ES.json            # Spanish (Spain)
  ja-JP.json            # Japanese
  zh-CN.json            # Chinese (Simplified)
```

## Translation File Format

```json
{
  "plugin": {
    "name": "My Plugin",
    "tagline": "Make awesome designs"
  },
  "actions": {
    "export": "Export",
    "import": "Import",
    "cancel": "Cancel",
    "save": "Save",
    "delete": "Delete"
  },
  "messages": {
    "success": "Operation completed successfully",
    "error": "An error occurred",
    "loading": "Loading..."
  },
  "features": {
    "export": {
      "title": "Export Nodes",
      "description": "Export selected nodes as PNG or SVG",
      "button": "Export Now"
    }
  },
  "settings": {
    "title": "Settings",
    "language": {
      "label": "Language",
      "description": "Choose your preferred language"
    },
    "theme": {
      "label": "Theme",
      "light": "Light",
      "dark": "Dark"
    }
  },
  "errors": {
    "noSelection": "Please select at least one node",
    "exportFailed": "Export failed: {{error}}",
    "invalidInput": "Please enter a valid value"
  }
}
```

### Nested Keys

Use dot notation for deep nesting:

```json
{
  "modal": {
    "about": {
      "title": "About {{pluginName}}",
      "version": "Version {{version}}",
      "description": "Built with ❤️ by {{author}}"
    },
    "export": {
      "title": "Export Options",
      "format": {
        "label": "Format",
        "options": {
          "png": "PNG Image",
          "svg": "SVG Vector",
          "pdf": "PDF Document"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## i18n Service

### Initialization

```typescript
// /src/utils/i18n.ts

import enUS from '../app/content/translations/en-US.json'
import frFR from '../app/content/translations/fr-FR.json'

const translations: { [key: string]: any } = {
  'en-US': enUS,
  'fr-FR': frFR
}

let currentLanguage = 'en-US'

/**
 * Set current language
 */
export const setLanguage = (lang: string) => {
  if (translations[lang]) {
    currentLanguage = lang
  } else {
    console.warn(`Language ${lang} not found, falling back to en-US`)
    currentLanguage = 'en-US'
  }
}

/**
 * Get translation by key
 */
export const t = (key: string, params?: { [key: string]: string }): string => {
  const keys = key.split('.')
  let value: any = translations[currentLanguage]
  
  for (const k of keys) {
    if (value && typeof value === 'object') {
      value = value[k]
    } else {
      return key // Return key if not found
    }
  }
  
  if (typeof value !== 'string') {
    return key
  }
  
  // Replace parameters {{paramName}}
  if (params) {
    return value.replace(/\{\{(\w+)\}\}/g, (match, paramName) => {
      return params[paramName] || match
    })
  }
  
  return value
}

/**
 * Get current language
 */
export const getCurrentLanguage = () => currentLanguage

/**
 * Get available languages
 */
export const getAvailableLanguages = () => Object.keys(translations)
```

### Integration with External Service

```typescript
// /src/app/external/translation/index.ts

import { setLanguage as setI18nLanguage, t } from '../../../utils/i18n'

/**
 * Load user's preferred language from Figma storage
 */
export const loadUserLanguage = async () => {
  // Request from Canvas
  sendPluginMessage({
    pluginMessage: {
      type: 'LOAD_LANGUAGE_PREFERENCE'
    }
  })
}

/**
 * Save user's preferred language to Figma storage
 */
export const saveUserLanguage = async (language: string) => {
  setI18nLanguage(language)
  
  // Save to Canvas
  sendPluginMessage({
    pluginMessage: {
      type: 'SAVE_LANGUAGE_PREFERENCE',
      data: { language }
    }
  })
}

// Listen for language loaded from Canvas
window.addEventListener('message', (event) => {
  const msg = event.data.pluginMessage
  
  if (msg?.type === 'LANGUAGE_PREFERENCE_LOADED') {
    if (msg.data?.language) {
      setI18nLanguage(msg.data.language)
    }
  }
})
```

## Using Translations in Components

### Class Components

```typescript
import { t } from '../../../utils/i18n'

interface Props {
  t: (key: string, params?: any) => string
}

class ExportPanel extends React.Component<Props> {
  render() {
    return (
      <div>
        <h2>{this.props.t('features.export.title')}</h2>
        <p>{this.props.t('features.export.description')}</p>
        <Button
          label={this.props.t('features.export.button')}
          action={this.handleExport}
        />
      </div>
    )
  }
}

// Wrap with translation HOC
export default WithTranslation(ExportPanel)
```

### WithTranslation HOC

```typescript
// /src/app/ui/components/WithTranslation.tsx

import React from 'react'
import { t, getCurrentLanguage } from '../../../utils/i18n'

interface WithTranslationProps {
  t: (key: string, params?: any) => string
  currentLanguage: string
}

export function WithTranslation<P extends WithTranslationProps>(
  Component: React.ComponentType<P>
) {
  return class extends React.Component<Omit<P, keyof WithTranslationProps>> {
    render() {
      return (
        <Component
          {...(this.props as P)}
          t={t}
          currentLanguage={getCurrentLanguage()}
        />
      )
    }
  }
}
```

### Functional Components with Hook

```typescript
// /src/app/hooks/useTranslation.ts

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { t as translate, getCurrentLanguage } from '../../utils/i18n'

export const useTranslation = () => {
  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(getCurrentLanguage())
  
  useEffect(() => {
    // Listen for language changes
    const handleLanguageChange = () => {
      setLanguage(getCurrentLanguage())
    }
    
    window.addEventListener('languagechange', handleLanguageChange)
    return () => window.removeEventListener('languagechange', handleLanguageChange)
  }, [])
  
  return {
    t: translate,
    currentLanguage: language
  }
}

// Usage
function MyComponent() {
  const { t, currentLanguage } = useTranslation()
  
  return (
    <div>
      <h1>{t('plugin.name')}</h1>
      <p>{t('plugin.tagline')}</p>
      <p>Current: {currentLanguage}</p>
    </div>
  )
}
```

## Parameter Substitution

### Basic Substitution

```typescript
// Translation file
{
  "greeting": "Hello, {{name}}!",
  "itemCount": "You have {{count}} items"
}

// Usage
t('greeting', { name: 'John' })
// Output: "Hello, John!"

t('itemCount', { count: '5' })
// Output: "You have 5 items"
```

### Multiple Parameters

```typescript
// Translation file
{
  "exportSuccess": "Exported {{count}} nodes as {{format}} in {{duration}}ms"
}

// Usage
t('exportSuccess', {
  count: '10',
  format: 'PNG',
  duration: '1234'
})
// Output: "Exported 10 nodes as PNG in 1234ms"
```

## Pluralization

### Simple Pluralization

```typescript
// Add plural handling to i18n service
export const tp = (key: string, count: number, params?: any): string => {
  const singularKey = `${key}.singular`
  const pluralKey = `${key}.plural`
  
  const translationKey = count === 1 ? singularKey : pluralKey
  return t(translationKey, { ...params, count: count.toString() })
}

// Translation file
{
  "nodes": {
    "singular": "{{count}} node selected",
    "plural": "{{count}} nodes selected"
  }
}

// Usage
tp('nodes', 1)  // "1 node selected"
tp('nodes', 5)  // "5 nodes selected"
```

### Advanced Pluralization

```typescript
{
  "items": {
    "zero": "No items",
    "one": "One item",
    "other": "{{count}} items"
  }
}

// Enhanced pluralization
export const tp = (key: string, count: number, params?: any): string => {
  let suffix = 'other'
  
  if (count === 0) suffix = 'zero'
  else if (count === 1) suffix = 'one'
  
  return t(`${key}.${suffix}`, { ...params, count: count.toString() })
}
```

## Language Selector Component

```typescript
// /src/app/ui/modules/LangPreferences.tsx

import React from 'react'
import { Dropdown } from '@unoff/ui'
import { getAvailableLanguages, getCurrentLanguage } from '../../../utils/i18n'
import { saveUserLanguage } from '../../external/translation'

interface Props {
  t: (key: string) => string
}

interface State {
  selectedLanguage: string
}

export default class LangPreferences extends React.Component<Props, State> {
  constructor(props: Props) {
    super(props)
    this.state = {
      selectedLanguage: getCurrentLanguage()
    }
  }
  
  handleLanguageChange = async (language: string) => {
    this.setState({ selectedLanguage: language })
    await saveUserLanguage(language)
    
    // Refresh the app to apply new language
    window.location.reload()
  }
  
  render() {
    const languages = getAvailableLanguages()
    
    const languageNames: { [key: string]: string } = {
      'en-US': 'English',
      'fr-FR': 'Français',
      'de-DE': 'Deutsch',
      'es-ES': 'Español',
      'ja-JP': '日本語',
      'zh-CN': '简体中文'
    }
    
    const options = languages.map(lang => ({
      label: languageNames[lang] || lang,
      value: lang,
      type: 'OPTION' as const,
      isActive: this.state.selectedLanguage === lang,
      action: () => this.handleLanguageChange(lang)
    }))
    
    return (
      <div>
        <label>{this.props.t('settings.language.label')}</label>
        <Dropdown
          id="language-selector"
          options={options}
          selected={this.state.selectedLanguage}
          pin="BOTTOM"
        />
      </div>
    )
  }
}
```

## Canvas-Side Language Support

```typescript
// /src/bridges/language/saveLanguagePreference.ts

export const saveLanguagePreference = async (language: string): Promise<boolean> => {
  try {
    await figma.clientStorage.setAsync('language', language)
    return true
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to save language:', error)
    return false
  }
}

// /src/bridges/language/loadLanguagePreference.ts

export const loadLanguagePreference = async (): Promise<string> => {
  try {
    const language = await figma.clientStorage.getAsync('language')
    return language || 'en-US'
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to load language:', error)
    return 'en-US'
  }
}

// In loadUI.ts
SAVE_LANGUAGE_PREFERENCE: async () => {
  const success = await saveLanguagePreference(msg.data.language)
  figma.ui.postMessage({
    type: 'LANGUAGE_PREFERENCE_SAVED',
    data: { success }
  })
},

LOAD_LANGUAGE_PREFERENCE: async () => {
  const language = await loadLanguagePreference()
  figma.ui.postMessage({
    type: 'LANGUAGE_PREFERENCE_LOADED',
    data: { language }
  })
}
```

## Best Practices

### 1. Use Descriptive Keys

```typescript
// ✅ Descriptive hierarchy
t('features.export.success.message')

// ❌ Generic keys
t('msg1')
```

### 2. Keep Translations Consistent

```typescript
// ✅ Same structure across languages
// en-US.json
{ "actions": { "save": "Save", "cancel": "Cancel" } }

// fr-FR.json
{ "actions": { "save": "Enregistrer", "cancel": "Annuler" } }

// ❌ Inconsistent structure
// en-US.json
{ "save": "Save", "cancel": "Cancel" }

// fr-FR.json
{ "actions": { "save": "Enregistrer" } } // Missing cancel
```

### 3. Avoid Concatenation

```typescript
// ✅ Complete sentence in translation
t('welcomeMessage', { name: user.name })
// Translation: "Welcome back, {{name}}!"

// ❌ Concatenating partial translations
t('welcome') + ' ' + user.name + t('punctuation')
```

### 4. Handle Missing Translations

```typescript
// ✅ Fallback to key
export const t = (key: string): string => {
  const value = getTranslation(key)
  if (!value) {
    console.warn(`Missing translation: ${key}`)
    return key  // Return key as fallback
  }
  return value
}
```

### 5. Test All Languages

```typescript
// Create a language testing utility
export const validateTranslations = () => {
  const languages = getAvailableLanguages()
  const baseKeys = getAllKeys(translations['en-US'])
  
  for (const lang of languages) {
    const langKeys = getAllKeys(translations[lang])
    const missingKeys = baseKeys.filter(key => !langKeys.includes(key))
    
    if (missingKeys.length > 0) {
      console.error(`Missing keys in ${lang}:`, missingKeys)
    }
  }
}
```

## Right-to-Left (RTL) Support

```typescript
// Add RTL detection
const RTL_LANGUAGES = ['ar', 'he', 'fa', 'ur']

export const isRTL = (language: string): boolean => {
  const langCode = language.split('-')[0]
  return RTL_LANGUAGES.includes(langCode)
}

// Apply RTL in component
const { currentLanguage } = useTranslation()
const direction = isRTL(currentLanguage) ? 'rtl' : 'ltr'

<div dir={direction}>
  {/* Content */}
</div>
```

## Date/Number Formatting

```typescript
// /src/utils/i18n.ts

/**
 * Format number with current locale
 */
export const formatNumber = (num: number): string => {
  return new Intl.NumberFormat(getCurrentLanguage()).format(num)
}

/**
 * Format date with current locale
 */
export const formatDate = (date: Date): string => {
  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat(getCurrentLanguage()).format(date)
}

/**
 * Format currency
 */
export const formatCurrency = (amount: number, currency: string = 'USD'): string => {
  return new Intl.NumberFormat(getCurrentLanguage(), {
    style: 'currency',
    currency
  }).format(amount)
}

// Usage
formatNumber(1234567.89)      // "1,234,567.89" (en-US)
                              // "1 234 567,89" (fr-FR)

formatDate(new Date())        // "2/24/2026" (en-US)
                              // "24/02/2026" (fr-FR)

formatCurrency(99.99, 'USD')  // "$99.99" (en-US)
                              // "99,99 $US" (fr-FR)
```
